# OpenDraft

> OpenDraft is a marketplace for buying and selling apps built with AI tools like Lovable. Builders list their projects, buyers discover and purchase them instantly.

## Key Links

- Homepage: https://opendraft.lovable.app
- Browse Listings: https://opendraft.lovable.app
- Sell an App: https://opendraft.lovable.app/sell
- Bounties: https://opendraft.lovable.app/bounties
- Builders Directory: https://opendraft.lovable.app/builders
- FAQ: https://opendraft.lovable.app/faq
- Full LLM Context: https://opendraft.lovable.app/llms-full.txt
- MCP Server: https://xwumrdcagsuwqeelyxih.supabase.co/functions/v1/mcp-server
- API Plugin Manifest: https://opendraft.lovable.app/.well-known/ai-plugin.json

## What You Can Do

- **Browse**: Search and filter marketplace listings by category, tech stack, and price
- **Buy**: Purchase apps with one-time or subscription pricing via Stripe
- **Sell**: List your AI-built apps with screenshots, demos, and source code
- **Bounties**: Post or fulfill project bounties for custom builds
- **Chat**: Message builders directly about their listings
- **Remix**: Fork and build on top of existing listings

## Categories

- SaaS Tools
- AI Apps
- Landing Pages
- Utilities
- Games
- Other

## Pricing Models

- One-time purchase
- Monthly subscription
- Free (open source)

## For AI Agents

OpenDraft exposes an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that allows agents to:
1. Search and browse listings programmatically
2. View listing details, pricing, and tech stacks
3. Create user accounts and builder profiles
4. List and sell new apps on the marketplace
5. Initiate purchases on behalf of users

Connect to the MCP server at: https://xwumrdcagsuwqeelyxih.supabase.co/functions/v1/mcp-server
